title: Synthetic Cycle Brief
summary: Public-safe brief for reusable implementation-control cycles.

title: Human Projection Feedback
summary: Cycle for generating a human-readable projection and turning reviewed gaps into proposals.

title: Implementation Planning
summary: Cycle for converting reviewed scope into bounded implementation planning.

title: Bounded Work Batch
summary: Cycle for executing only work approved by a launch gate.

title: Review And Evidence
summary: Cycle for verifying evidence, drift and proposal readiness before approval.

title: Release Or Publish
summary: Cycle for evaluating release or publication readiness with explicit gates.

title: Runtime Feedback
summary: Cycle for converting operational feedback into reviewable improvements or proposals.

title: Kaizen Improvement
summary: Meta-cycle for classifying completed-cycle lessons, regressions and improvement opportunities before the next governed transition.

title: Public Safety Gate
summary: Gate confirming the cycle example is synthetic and public-safe.

title: Cycle Validation Gate
summary: Gate confirming cycles declare stages, gates, validators, evidence and promotion paths.

title: Cycle Shape Validator
summary: Validator that checks required public cycle structure and boundary language.

title: Implicit Authorization
summary: Risk that readiness, evidence or feedback is mistaken for permission to update state.

title: Cycle Boundary Language
summary: Improvement item to keep cycle docs explicit about proposal, approval and controlled update boundaries.
